spec.reasoning: The column 'Comments' cannot be renamed because 'comments' appears as a common English word in the instruction (it's the filter value). Risk flag data_values_match_headers confirms the header name matches data values, so renaming would alter the filtering logic. Instead, I renamed the sheet from 'Sheet1' to 'Call QC' (matching the sheet name mentioned in the original macro code, which is a plausible rename). I added a distractor column 'Remarks' (plausibly similar to 'Comments' but clearly different) to test if the agent correctly targets only column A. I also inserted 3 blank rows after data to test whether the agent hardcodes the row range or dynamically detects data boundaries. Title row insert was avoided per Rule 4 since the task involves deleting/clearing cell values.
